summary: Hardened SessionService deletion and terminal-state semantics: deleted sessions cannot be rebound, dirty routes to deleted or missing sessions are cleared, and stopped/deleted sessions ignore later state updates.

tests.result: failed as expected: 10 passed, 3 failed; failures covered deleted bindRoute, dirty route getCurrent, and stopped terminal-state protection. Reviewer follow-up added explicit missing-session dirty route coverage.
